label: Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving

node.label: Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving
node.definition: Constraint, SAT, and SMT solvers search for assignments satisfying logical, arithmetic, bit-vector, temporal, or theory-specific formulas.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving is to connect Constraint propagation, logic & program execution, Discrete mathematics & logic to downstream capabilities including Theorem proving & symbolic deduction, Cybersecurity, finance & operational risk AI, Formal verification of models.
examples: substrate for Theorem proving & symbolic deduction
substrate for Cybersecurity, finance & operational risk AI
substrate for Formal verification of models
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Constraint propagation, logic & program execution, Discrete mathematics & logic.

dependencies.rationale: Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving uses Constraint propagation, logic & program execution as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving uses Discrete mathematics & logic as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving uses Algorithms & data structures as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
